name: Nevis - AI Engineer - London

workExperience.title: Self-Directed Investor
bullets: Manage a discretionary multi-asset portfolio with full responsibility for strategy, execution and risk across 60+ positions spanning equities, fixed income, commodities and digital assets.
Top-down factor-based framework combining UCITS smart-beta ETFs (core) with satellite exposure in precious metals, emerging markets, and European infrastructure.

workExperience.title: Solutions Architect
bullets: Technical advisor to 66 EMEA customers, driving $2.5M ARR with 79% win rate across a $4.8M pipeline through technical discovery, architecture guidance and POC development.

Built full-stack GenAI architecture demos on Amazon Bedrock with MCP integrations for AI-native startups; including architecting PickMyCall's production voice agent for Roojoom on Amazon Nova Sonic, cutting response latency by 82% in under 2 weeks (published).
Designed and delivered 20+ technical sessions at AWS EMEA events (Stockholm Dev Day, London Summit, GenAI & Data Day) reaching 500+ attendees on GenAI, RAG and agentic architectures for production.
Identified 35%+ cost reduction opportunities across logistics, POS and consultancy clients through database & VM rightsizing, usage optimisation and S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

workExperience.title: Sales Programs and Strategy Associate
bullets: Redesigned sales plays platform through discovery interviews with 30+ EMEA AEs and C-level collaboration at Seattle HQ; built Tableau CRM dashboards delivering forecasting, pipeline analytics and renewal insights to 300+ account executives.

workExperience.title: Data Engineer Intern - Operations Department
bullets: Built Python Excel automation and SQL pipelines reducing financial report generation by 60% while ensuring GDPR data anonymization.

workExperience.title: Founder
bullets: Founded online education platform serving 30+ Engineering & Business university students. (85% reported as their primary study resource)

education.school: ICAI School of Engineering (Universidad Pontificia Comillas)
education.degree: B.Eng in Computer Engineering | B.B.A in Business Analytics
details: Virtual Q - B.Eng Thesis (Grade: 95%): Built microservice theme park application with Django API & React Native, implementing virtual queue systems and interactive maps - reducing ride wait times by 50%.
Factify - B.B.A Thesis (Grade: 94%): Developed news platform using open-source LLMs and Python NLP for fact extraction. Built financial models with Monte Carlo simulations for startup validation.

education.degree: Exchange Program - Computer Engineering and Business Management
details: Additional Certificates: Deloitte & HSBC FinTech Olympiad

jobDescription:
About Nevis

Nevis is building the world’s first AI wealth management platform. In just 9 months, Nevis has grown to have over $50 billion of assets under management on its platform and is on track to have over $100 billion by the end of this year.

Nevis is also backed by world leading investors and has raised a total of $40 million from Sequoia Capital, ICONIQ and Ribbit. Together it makes Nevis one of the highest funded and fastest growing Series A startups in Europe.

The Role

We are looking for a talented and driven AI Engineer to join our core team at Nevis where you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next-generation AI-first wealthtech product. You will address critical challenges faced by our business clients by building LLM-driven agentic automation pipelines.

You’ll work with cutting-edge LLM models and collaborate with leading vendors to enhance our product’s reasoning capabilities and elevate the quality of our models’ outputs to industry-leading standards - constantly raising the bar higher.

As part of a small, world-class team of engineers and product builders, including the former Head of AI at Revolut, you’ll have a unique opportunity to make a profound impact on one of the world’s largest industries.
What You’ll Do

    Design and build LLM and ML-powered products and features across Nevis’ platform.

    Collaborate with engineers and product builders to bring new AI capabilities from experiment to production.

    Establish best practices and design novel approaches for AI development, testing, observability, and reliability.

    Continuously monitor and improve AI products performance and reasoning quality.

    Partner with product and design teams to prototype and iterate on new AI features and products.

    Stay ahead of the latest advances in Gen AI space, including agentic systems, reasoning capabilities and context engineering.

Who You Are

    Hands on experience with LLMs

    Proven track record of solving real-world problems with AI / ML

    Advanced statistical and data analysis skills

    STEM degree from top university

    Passionate about transformative AI technologies

    Product-driven mindset: prioritizing practical ML solutions for better client outcomes

    Proactive problem solver with "get it done" attitude

    Excellent communication skills for effective team collaboration

    Thrive in a fast-paced, high-growth environment and take ownership end-to-end

Nice to Have

    Prior experience in AI startups

    Strong publications or GitHub profile

Why Join Nevis?

    Work alongside a high-calibre founding team backed by some of the best investors in the world.

    A fast-paced, high-growth environment with the opportunity to shape how the business operates.

    Be part of a mission-driven company transforming the wealth management industry with huge potential for global impact.

    25 days’ annual leave.

    Private medical insurance.

    Competitive salary and benefits package, including company equity.
